title: RegistrarSecurityContacts
description: Abuse and security contact metadata for a single registrar.

abuse_email.description: Registrar abuse contact email, or 'unknown' when no primary record was resolvable.

security_txt.description: RFC 9116 security.txt presence at the registrar's .well-known path.

policy_url.description: Published abuse/acceptable-use policy URL, if confirmed.

fieldProvenance.description: Per-field provenance. Maps a field name in this record to the source URL it was checked against, its verification status and the timestamp of that check. Field-level entries are authoritative over the record-level verification_status/last_checked for the field they describe.

source_url.description: Primary source URL the field value was checked against.

note.description: Optional human-readable note describing how this specific field was checked.
